stepsSummary: Log workout from protocol, modify exercise details, and choose variant/update flow.
expectedSummary: Routine-change modal appears and accepts user decision without data corruption.
summary: BUG: UAT-008 Routine versioning after workout changes - TimeoutError: page.waitForFunction: Timeout 7000ms exceeded.
reproSteps: Open Protocols tab and verify protocol workspace availability.
Log workout with explicit exercise changes against baseline.
If routine-change modal appears, validate dismissal/decision controls.
expected: Routine-change modal appears and accepts user decision without data corruption.
recommendation: Fix the failing Strength flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-008 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Protocol workflow does not deadlock UI.
Verify: State remains consistent after routine decision flow.
